segments.text: Children, obey your parents in the Lord: for this is right.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Honour thy father and mother; (which is the first commandment with promise;)
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: That it may be well with thee, and thou mayest live long on the earth.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And, ye fathers, provoke not your children to wrath: but bring them up in the nurture and admonition of the Lord.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Servants, be obedient to them that are your masters according to the flesh, with fear and trembling, in singleness of your heart, as unto Christ;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Not with eyeservice, as menpleasers; but as the servants of Christ, doing the will of God from the heart;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: With good will doing service, as to the Lord, and not to men:
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Knowing that whatsoever good thing any man doeth, the same shall he receive of the Lord, whether he be bond or free.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And, ye masters, do the same things unto them, forbearing threatening: knowing that your Master also is in heaven; neither is there respect of persons with him.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Finally, my brethren, be strong in the Lord, and in the power of his might.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Put on the whole armour of God, that ye may be able to stand against the wiles of the devil.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities, against powers, against the rulers of the darkness of this world, against spiritual wickedness in high places.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Wherefore take unto you the whole armour of God, that ye may be able to withstand in the evil day, and having done all, to stand.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Stand therefore, having your loins girt about with truth, and having on the breastplate of righteousness;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And your feet shod with the preparation of the gospel of peace;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Above all, taking the shield of faith, wherewith ye shall be able to quench all the fiery darts of the wicked.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God:
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Praying always with all prayer and supplication in the Spirit, and watching thereunto with all perseverance and supplication for all saints;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And for me, that utterance may be given unto me, that I may open my mouth boldly, to make known the mystery of the gospel,
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For which I am an ambassador in bonds: that therein I may speak boldly, as I ought to speak.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But that ye also may know my affairs, and how I do, Tychicus, a beloved brother and faithful minister in the Lord, shall make known to you all things:
Whom I have sent unto you for the same purpose, that ye might know our affairs, and that he might comfort your hearts.
Peace be to the brethren, and love with faith, from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Grace be with all them that love our Lord Jesus Christ in sincerity. Amen.
segments.speaker: Paul
